subject: test(components): composite-component regression suite — 8 new files, 72 new tests
body:
Closes out the "complex composites" TODO item. Every component touched
during the custom-code-reduction epic now has a regression test file.

New test files (jsdom env):
- IntentSelector — 7 tests: DEFAULT_INTENTS render, add/remove, cap,
  custom-intent persistence to recentTones, intent-specific label +
  placeholder.
- ProposeChangeForm — 8 tests: pre-fill, hasChanges gate on submit,
  whitespace-only rejects, successful submit payload, Cancel,
  counter-proposal copy flip, character counter.
- AddNoteForm — 7 tests: default state (source=in-app, empty content),
  all 6 source options render, empty + whitespace rejected,
  successful submit payload, typing clears error, Cancel.
- ModuleSummaryEditor — 6 tests: collapsed-by-default, auto-expand
  when populated, toggle, blur-save with trim, unchanged-skip,
  empty-to-null clear.
- NotificationBell — 11 tests: no-badge / badge-N / 9+ cap, open via
  trigger, empty state, Escape closes, outside-click closes, item
  click fires mark-read + navigate + close, delete X, mark-all-read
  visibility + action.
- PwaInstallPrompt — 9 tests (mocks usePWAInstall): 30s delay gate,
  native-Install button for Chromium, How-to-Install for Safari/
  Firefox, hidden when installed / dismissed / no-install-path,
  native Install click, manual instructions click opens modal,
  dismiss click.
- ContractUploadPreview — 15 tests: filename + count + format notice,
  parserWarning alert, Create count reflects included-only, include
  toggle, Confirm payload excludes deselected, Cancel, rename via
  Enter, rename Escape abort, reorder via Move-down, Move-up-disabled
  on first, oversized Split + disabled Create, Merge-with-next, batch
  progress UI, Retry failed, split-sub-sections toggle.
- TemplateSelector — 9 tests: default to Templates tab, Upload-tab
  hidden without onUploadModules, template click fires onSelect,
  Blank module fires onSelect(null), Cancel, tab-switch reveals file
  picker, oversized file → alert, disallowed file type → alert via
  fireEvent.change bypassing userEvent's accept-filter.

Notes on test approach:
- PwaInstallPrompt: mocked usePWAInstall via vi.mock for hermetic
  control over state. Fake timers advance past SHOW_DELAY_MS inside
  act(); real timers restored before userEvent interactions so the
  event pipeline's internal microtasks resolve normally.
- TemplateSelector upload tests: for disallowed MIME types userEvent.
  upload's applyAccept filter silently drops the file, so the
  validateFile() guard was untested. fireEvent.change + direct
  files-property defineProperty bypasses the accept filter and
  exercises the runtime guard — which is what actually matters for
  drag-and-drop paths in real browsers.
- IntentSelector `cap: string[]` annotation: DEFAULT_INTENTS's literal-
  union element type makes `cap.includes(otherLiteral)` a type error;
  widening cap to string[] lets us search the full tuple without casts.

Result: npm test → 20 files / 155 tests passing (was 12 / 83). tsc -b
clean, eslint clean. TODO "Testing Infrastructure" entry collapsed:
composite-component coverage shipped; only coverage-reporting item
remains.

Tags: testing, components, regression

Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
